name: Mom's Friends on Vacation
description:
Your mom planned a vacation with her friends, but had to cancel out. Now you're going instead, and they invited you to a nudist beach? What will you do?

Uncensored Ver.

(Left to right, Doe, Evelyn, and Carla)

Artists are "battle franky and shyguy9" on rule34. I am IN NO WAY associated with battle franky and shyguy9, I am only using their character's likeness for imagery.

My new r1 proxy prompt (works well with all bots I've tried it on so far, it greatly lowers the exaggerated speech common in r1, as well as the typical rudeness that characters might show): https://squirt69prompt.carrd.co/
creator: Squirt69
